title: User can create a text post and optionally upload images
description: The system shall allow a logged-in user to create a new post containing text content and optionally upload one or more images, which will then be saved and shared with other users.
rationale: This requirement is necessary to enable users to share their thoughts and media with others, enhancing community engagement and interaction.
business_value: Increasing user engagement and content sharing can lead to higher user retention and a more vibrant social environment within the platform.

source.description: As a user I need to create a text post and optionally upload images so that I can share content with others.

acceptance_criteria: A logged-in user can create a new post containing text content.
A logged-in user can optionally upload one or more images to the post.
The post is saved and shared with other users.
preconditions: The user must be logged in.
postconditions: The post is successfully created and saved.
The post is visible to other users.
security_requirements: Authentication of the user before creating a post.
Encryption of any uploaded images for data security.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system must respond within 2 seconds when creating and saving a post with text content and images.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must handle at least 1,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and user-friendly.

edge_cases: User tries to create a post without any content or images.
System fails to save a post due to network issues.
A user attempts to upload an image that exceeds the file size limit.
dependencies: Authentication system for verifying user identity.
Image processing service for handling uploaded images.

interfaces.name: Post Creation API
interfaces.description: Interface used to receive and process post creation requests from the UI or other services.

interfaces.name: Content Database
interfaces.description: Stores information about posts, including text content and image metadata.

interfaces.name: Image Storage Service
interfaces.description: Used for storing uploaded images securely and making them accessible to other users.

test_cases.description: User creates a post with text content only.
test_cases.expected_result: The post is successfully created, saved in the database, and visible to other users.

test_cases.description: User creates a post with both text content and images.
test_cases.expected_result: The post is successfully created, saved in the database, and visible to other users. Images are stored securely and linked to the post.

test_cases.description: User tries to create a post without any content or images.
test_cases.expected_result: The system rejects the request and displays an error message indicating that both text content and/or images are required.
